scope_note: Cert [487]: QA Witt Tower Altcoin Return-Rank Crash Reversion Scope. Primary source: Fama EF (1970) doi:10.2307/2325486. Data: Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV via yfinance. Return-rank a=b+2e<=6 operator (cert [482] definition) tested on SOL-USD/BNB-USD/ADA-USD/DOGE-USD. Tests whether crash-reversion is crypto ASSET CLASS property (all coins) or BTC/ETH-specific. Cert [486] established non-crypto NULL; this cert tests the crypto interior. orbit_family on (b,e,m=27): Singularity-type pairs (a<=6) predict mean reversion in crypto microstructure. MOD=27.
